title: Injection Prevention via Encoding & Sanitization
summary: This chapter discusses how to handle untrusted data to prevent technical vulnerabilities such as XSS and Injection through output encoding and data sanitization.
focus: Use parameterized queries for database access.
Apply contextual output encoding to data rendered in the browser.
Sanitize HTML data using safe and tested libraries.
evidence: SAST (Static Analysis) report for injection sink detection.
Code review in the dynamic data rendering section.
Evidence of using a framework that performs auto-encoding.
reporting: Wajib bebas dari High-risk Injection vulnerabilities.
analogy: Such as filtering dirty water (outside data) before it enters the house's clean water tank (system).

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Injection Prevention via Encoding & Sanitization'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Injection Prevention via Encoding & Sanitization'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Prevention of Injection via Encoding & Sanitization'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Input Validation & Business Logic Integrity
summary: Ensure input data is formatted and the application's business logic cannot be manipulated for illegitimate gain.
focus: Validate data type, length, and format (Allow-list).
Make sure the business flow (step-by-step) cannot be bypassed.
Prevent manipulation of price or quantity parameters in transactions.
evidence: Bug bounty report regarding business logic bypass.
reporting: Meliputi integritas data dan kepatuhan aturan bisnis.
analogy: Checking tickets and IDs at the cinema to ensure people are sitting in the correct seats.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Input Validation & Business Logic Integrity'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Input Validation & Business Logic Integrity'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Input Validation & Business Logic Integrity'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Client & Browser Side Security
summary: Focus on protecting applications running in the browser, including content security policies and origin isolation.
focus: Implement a strict Content Security Policy (CSP).
Use the Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite cookie attributes.
Verifikasi integritas resource eksternal (Subresource Integrity).
evidence: CSP configuration on the web server side.
Evidence of no use of 'unsafe-inline' in the script.
analogy: Install a fence and CCTV in the yard so that strangers cannot send suspicious packages inside.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Client & Browser Side Security'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Client & Browser Side Security'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Client & Browser Side Security'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Web Services & API Endpoint Security
summary: Ensures secure communication between systems, including REST, GraphQL, and WebSocket.
focus: Validate HTTP message structure (JSON/XML).
Implement rate-limiting restrictions at the API level.
Use secure token-based authorization.
analogy: Officers at service counters who only serve people with complete and correct forms.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Web Services & API Endpoint Security'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Web Service & API Endpoint Security'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Web Services & API Endpoint Security'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: File Handling & Secure Storage
summary: Protects the system from malicious files uploaded and ensures safe file access.
focus: Save files outside the web root or in separate storage.
Strictly validate file extensions and MIME types.
Use random file names to prevent direct access.
evidence: Log antivirus scan results on uploaded files.
reporting: Integritas sistem dari ancaman malware via file.
analogy: Quarantine room to check delivery packages before they are brought into the building.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'File Handling & Secure Storage'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'File Handling & Secure Storage'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'File Handling & Secure Storage'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Authentication & Identity Verification
summary: Guarantees strong user identity verification, including password management and MFA.
focus: Implement a strong password policy (length > 12 characters).
Require MFA for accounts with privileged access.
Prevent username enumeration in login/forgot password forms.
reporting: Keamanan akun dan pencegahan ATO (Account Takeover).
analogy: Checking ID cards and face verification by security officers at the main gate.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Authentication & Identity Verification'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) to support 'Authentication & Identity Verification'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Authentication & Identity Verification'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: User Session Management
summary: Manage the session lifecycle to prevent session hijacking.
focus: Use high entropy session tokens.
Implement session timeouts (inactivity & absolute).
Destroy the session on the server side when the user logs out.
evidence: Proof of token withdrawal in database/cache when logging out.
analogy: Provide visitor wristbands that are valid for one day only in the recreation area.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'User Session Management'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'User Session Management'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'User Session Management'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Authorization & Access Rights Control
summary: Ensure users can only access resources they are entitled to.
focus: Apply the principle of 'Least Privilege'.
Perform authorization checks on the server side for each request.
Prevent direct access to data objects (IDOR).
evidence: Penetration testing results for authorization bypass.
Audit logs of access to sensitive data.
analogy: A hotel room key that can only open your room, not other guests' rooms.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Authorization & Access Rights Control'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) to support 'Authorization & Access Rights Control'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'Access Rights Authorization & Control'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Mandiri Token Security (JWT/Paseto)
summary: Secure the use of stateless tokens such as JWT so that they are not easily manipulated.
focus: Use a strong digital signature algorithm (e.g. EdDSA/RS256).
Do not store sensitive data in the token payload.
Validate token integrity and expiration on each endpoint.
evidence: Proof of using 'jti' to prevent reply attacks.
analogy: Meal coupons are stamped with a special stamp so they cannot be photocopied by other people.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Mandiri Token Security (JWT/Paseto)'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Mandiri Token Security (JWT/Paseto)'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Mandiri Token Security (JWT/Paseto)'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Third Party Access & Identity Delegation
summary: Secure third-party login integration and permission delegation using standard protocols.
focus: Use the 'state' parameter to prevent CSRF in OAuth flows.
Strictly validate redirect URIs.
Only ask for scope data that is really needed.
evidence: Configure the OAuth client in the Identity Provider.
Proof of using PKCE for public clients.
analogy: A special power of attorney that only allows the courier to pick up certain packages, not the entire contents of the warehouse.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Third Party Access & Identity Delegation'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) to support 'Third Party Access & Identity Delegation'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review SLAs and sanctions clauses (Right to Audit & Penalty) on vendors regarding implementation of 'Third Party Access & Identity Delegation'.

title: Secure Cryptography Implementation
summary: Use of standard encryption and hashing algorithms to protect data.
focus: Use algorithms that are not yet obsolete (eg: AES-GCM, Argon2id).
Manage cryptographic keys in HSM or Vault.
Avoid creating your own cryptographic algorithms.
evidence: Proof of key separation from source code (Code isolation).
Certification of the cryptographic module used.
reporting: Ketahanan data terhadap upaya dekripsi ilegal.
analogy: Uses a military standard padlock with the key stored in an iron safe.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Secure Cryptographic Implementation'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit for 'Secure Cryptographic Implementation'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'Secure Cryptography Implementation'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Communication Channel Security (TLS)
summary: Protects data as it moves between clients and servers through network encryption.
focus: Require the use of HTTPS/TLS across all application areas.
Disable legacy protocols (SSLv3, TLS 1.0, 1.1).
Implement HSTS to prevent downgrading attacks.
evidence: SSL Labs Report with Grade A/A+.
Proof of a valid certificate from a trusted CA.
analogy: Sending secret letters in locked steel tubes carried by special couriers.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Communication Channel Security (TLS)'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Communication Channel Security (TLS)'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Communication Channel Security (TLS)'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Security & Hardening Configuration
summary: Ensure servers and application dependencies are configured securely.
focus: Turn off unneeded server features/services.
Use secret management for API Key/DB Pass.
Regularly update library dependencies to patch gaps.
analogy: Make sure all additional windows and doors in the house are locked, not just the main door.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Security & Hardening Configuration'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Security Configuration & Hardening'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Security Configuration & Hardening'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Data Protection & Privacy
summary: Focus on protecting sensitive data during storage and processing.
focus: Classify data based on sensitivity level.
Apply masking or encryption to PII data in the database.
Make sure data is not leaked through cache or logs.
evidence: Proof of column encryption (Field-level encryption) in the DB.
Review log untuk memastikan tidak ada data sensitif (misal: CVV).
reporting: Kepatuhan terhadap regulasi perlindungan data pribadi.
analogy: Store patient medical records in a locked cabinet that only doctors can open.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Data Protection & Privacy'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit for 'Data Protection & Privacy'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Ensure the availability of valid consent and privacy policy addendum in accordance with PDP regulations for 'Data Protection & Privacy'.

title: Secure Coding Architecture & Principles
summary: Apply security design principles from the start of application development.
focus: Separate components based on trust levels (Trust Boundaries).
Use validated security libraries.
Implement safe error handling (Safe Error Handling).
reporting: Kekokohan desain aplikasi terhadap serangan sistemik.
analogy: Build houses with anti-earthquake foundations and fire-resistant materials.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Secure Coding Architecture & Principles'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Secure Coding Architecture & Principles'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Secure Coding Architecture & Principles'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Security Logging & Error Management
summary: Logging activity is important for attack detection and auditing.
focus: Log all authentication and access control failures.
Don't display stack traces or technical details to end users.
Make sure the logs cannot be modified by unauthorized parties.
evidence: Example of a user-friendly error message (generic error).
reporting: Kemampuan deteksi insiden dan audit trail.
analogy: Guest book and CCTV recordings that record anyone who tries to enter the restricted area.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Security Logging & Fault Management'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Security Logging & Fault Management'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Security Logging & Error Management'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Real-time Communications Security (WebRTC)
summary: Secures the flow of voice, video and data between browsers directly.
focus: Use SRTP for media stream encryption.
Secure signaling servers and TURN/STUN servers.
Ask the user for permission before accessing the camera or microphone.
evidence: Authorization log on the TURN server.
Review browser permissions for hardware access.
analogy: Telephone lines that are intercepted are encrypted so they cannot be listened to by cable operators.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Real-time Communications (WebRTC) Security'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Real-time Communication Security (WebRTC)'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Real-time Communications Security (WebRTC)'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.
